description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized lazertinib in combination with amivantamab is indicated for the first-line treatment of adult patients with advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) with EGFR exon 19 deletions or exon 21 L858R substitution mutations.

contributions.description: On 2025-03-17, the EMA provided approval to Lazcluze (lazertinib) for the therapeutic indication of lazertinib in combination with amivantamab is indicated for the first-line treatment of adult patients with advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) with EGFR exon 19 deletions or exon 21 L858R substitution mutations.
